jsonLd.title: Opening for Teacher at Byju's
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? Byju's in Lucknow offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Byju's:
Byju's is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Byju's!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
